title: One Day App Development Challenge
tagline: Build something real in one day — teams, mentors, and a campus-wide showcase.
about: The One Day App Development Challenge (ODADC) is SIREN’s annual flagship event. Participants form teams, scope an idea, and deliver an app or prototype in a single day. We plan to run ODADC every year and grow the showcase of student projects on this site.

years.title: ODADC 2026
years.summary: Second annual challenge — rules, resources, posters, and project showcase.

years.title: ODADC 2025
years.summary: Inaugural year — event photo gallery and project showcase.
